# An NBCU Shake-Up & Gucci’s Waiting Game

Closing the Gaetz, A Netflix Ratings Mystery, Comcast Spinco Questions
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVlhnU2Z2UzNBYjlQNVpJRGVKdz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVlhnU2Z2UzNBYjlQNVpJRGVKdz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.) | | |  | | --- | | **Closing the Gaetz, A Netflix Ratings Mystery, Comcast Spinco Questions** | | Happy Friday and welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon compendium of Puck’s best new reporting.     First up today, **Matt Belloni** chronicles the ascension of NBCU’s **Donna Langley** , who is now arguably Hollywood’s most powerful woman. Her promotion also ends her turf war with **Mark Lazarus** , who is getting Comcast’s spinoff cable networks as a consolation prize.     Plus, below the fold: **Lauren Sherman** has the latest on how long **Sabato De Sarno** can last at Gucci. **John Ourand** talks to the broadcast execs calling foul on Netflix’s **Tyson** - **Paul** ratings. **Tara Palmeri** reveals **Matt Gaetz** ’s options now that his A.G. journey has ended. On *The Grill Room* , **Jon Kelly** joins **Dylan Byers** to discuss the downstream effects of Comcast’s Spinco play. On *Fashion People* , Lauren chats with TikTok’s *favorite* personal stylist, **Allison Bornstein** , about her growing business. On *The Town* , Matt and actress **Mikey Madison** discuss the making of **Sean Baker** ’s breakout hit *Anora* . And on *The Powers That Be* , Lauren swings by the pod to contemplate the horserace among **Arnault** heirs to inherit the LVMH empire. | |  | | [Prima Donna](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVlhnU2Z2UzNBYjlQNVpJRGVKdz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3Mvd2hhdC1kb25uYS1sYW5nbGV5cy1wcm9tb3Rpb24tbWVhbnMtZm9yLW5iY3VuaXZlcnNhbC8_) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Donna Langley’s NBCUniversal anointment gives her full greenlight authority for movies, NBC, Bravo, and Peacock. It also ends a power struggle with fellow executive Mark Lazarus, now riding an ice floe of cable networks into uncertain seas. | | | |  | | --- | | **A MESSAGE FROM OUR SPONSOR** | |  | | **NOW AVAILABLE ON NETFLIX    [WATCH NOW](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVlhnU2Z2UzNBYjlQNVpJRGVKdz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmV0ZmxpeC5jb20vdGl0bGUvODE5MDE2OTY_)**   ·   For more information on *Emilia Pérez* , visit **[film.netflixawards.com](https://email.puck.)** | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [The Pale Kering](https://email.puck.) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | News and notes on the De Sarno sitch at Gucci, Kering’s executive shuffle, and where Blazy might land. | |  | | [About That Tyson-Paul Netflix Number…](https://email.puck.) | | JOHN OURAND | | The broadcast guys are calling bullshit on Netflix’s Tyson-Paul ratings. But Nielsen isn’t unbiased, either. Alas, as streaming reorients the industry toward self-reported data, the only constant is that nobody’s numbers really add up. | |  | | [Slamming the Gaetz](https://email.puck.) | | TARA PALMERI | | News and notes on the once—and future?—Florida congressman as he weighs his post-A.G. options: returning to the House, facing down an Ethics scandal, or even running for governor. Plus the latest on Trump’s Treasury bake-off and Rahm Emanuel’s fight club for D.N.C. chair. | | | |  | | --- | |  | |  | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [MSNBC in Exile](https://email.puck.) | | DYLAN BYERS | | Jon Kelly joins Dylan to discuss the cascading effects of Brian Roberts’ monumental decision to spin off NBCUniversal’s declining cable assets. Then they get into Rachel Maddow’s $125 million contract renegotiation and how MSNBC survives without the NBC mothership. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [What Not to Wear](https://email.puck.) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | Lauren is joined by TikTok’s favorite personal stylist, Allison Bornstein. They discuss the nuts and bolts of her growing business, her book, the power of the Three-Word Method, and why everyone has a closet full of clothes and nothing to wear. Plus, Lauren checks in on Condé Nast and Kering. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [‘Anora’ Actress Mikey Madison. Plus, ‘Wicked’ & ‘Gladiator II’](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt is joined by actress Mikey Madison to talk about her new movie ‘Anora,’ working for director Sean Baker, how she was cast in Quentin Tarantino’s film ‘Once Upon a Time In… Hollywood,’ why she wants a Hollywood mentor, and more. Matt then finishes the show with an opening box office prediction for ‘Wicked: Part One’ and ‘Gladiator II.’ | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Condé in Crisis & LVMH Succession Games](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & LAUREN SHERMAN | | Lauren Sherman joins Peter to discuss Vanity Fair’s anxiety-stoking decision to publish its annual Hollywood Issue three months early, raising questions about Condé Nast’s shaky financials. Then Lauren dishes about which Arnault heirs are in the running to inherit the LVMH empire. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVlhnU2Z2UzNBYjlQNVpJRGVKdz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
